goal_alignment: Move balanced-MoE source-rank hot/cold/helper partitioning into the MORI vendor snapshot API so training and inference callers can import the same MORI-owned contract.

source_changes.change: Added build_source_partition_from_offsets(...), optional selected/owner_compact presort and group-end metadata, kept build_source_partition(plan, ...), and tightened threshold-disabled plans to reset execution load and modeled reduction.
Exported build_source_partition_from_offsets through the public mori.ops surface.
Added coverage for offset-based source partition parity, owner-compact presort/group ends, and stricter threshold-disabled plan semantics.
Added JSON-safe owner-shard/owner-compact fields to the balanced-MoE plan record and updated the hot-helper execute path to prefer mori.ops.balanced_moe.build_source_partition_from_offsets.

remote_notes.reason: This pass was API/import validation only; an unrelated NexusTitan job was active on the node.

next_steps: Add a MORI EP C++/HIP API that accepts the source partition and owner-compact metadata directly instead of staging through the standard-EP wrapper.
Collapse normal/cold compact dispatch final layout so AITER/helper grouped MLP can consume MORI-owned expert-major rows directly.
Add a low-intrusion profile gate comparing standard owner-compact hot-helper to the new MORI-native partition path before attempting a long 8x throughput gate.
